mapper.update: UPDATE "xbpj_operation_flow" a SET "bonc_audit_point"=like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'), cmwa_export_path = like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'), cmca_file_type = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'), cmca_subject_id = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'), source_code = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'), belong_cmwa = like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'), "version" = like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'), allow_down = like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%') WHERE ModelNo = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "xbpj_operation_flow" a WHERE a."ModelNo"!=like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') AND a.bonc_audit_point=like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "xbpj_operation_flow" a WHERE a."ModelNo" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xbpj_operation_flow (business1, business2, source, business_area, field, AuditpointNo, AuditpointName, ModelNo, ModelName, model_type, bonc_audit_point, source_domain, model_online_time, audit_scope, model_url, model_OnlineJi_Time, model_logic, home_system, data_source, datastart_time, modelrunning_frequency, is_cured, "order", cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, belong_cmwa, version, allow_down, secondary_field, source_old, field_old) VALUES ( like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{source}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{businessAre}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNo}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_type}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{model_online_time}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{audit_scope}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_url}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_OnlineJi_Time}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_logic}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{home_system}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{data_source}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{datastart_time}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelrunning_frequency}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{is_cured}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{order}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryField}, '%'),'','' )
mapper.update: UPDATE "xbpj_operation_flow" SET business1 = like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%'), business2 = like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%'), source = like CONCAT('%', #{source}, '%'), business_area = like CONCAT('%', #{businessArea}, '%'), "field" = like CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%'), AuditpointNo = like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNo}, '%'), AuditpointName = like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'), ModelName = like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'), model_type = like CONCAT('%', #{model_type}, '%'), bonc_audit_point = like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'), source_domain = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain}, '%'), model_online_time = like CONCAT('%', #{model_online_time}, '%'), audit_scope = like CONCAT('%', #{audit_scope}, '%'), model_url = like CONCAT('%', #{model_url}, '%'), model_OnlineJi_Time = like CONCAT('%', #{model_OnlineJi_Time}, '%'), model_logic = like CONCAT('%', #{model_logic}, '%'), home_system = like CONCAT('%', #{home_system}, '%'), data_source = like CONCAT('%', #{data_source}, '%'), datastart_time = like CONCAT('%', #{datastart_time}, '%'), modelrunning_frequency = like CONCAT('%', #{modelrunning_frequency}, '%'), is_cured = like CONCAT('%', #{is_cured}, '%'), "order" = like CONCAT('%', #{order}, '%'), cmwa_export_path = like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'), cmca_file_type = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'), cmca_subject_id = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'), source_code = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'), belong_cmwa = like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'), version = like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'), allow_down = like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%'), secondary_field = like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryField}, '%') WHERE ModelNo = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS noTxmodelCount FROM "spl_mainten_db" a WHERE a."is_tx" = '0' AND a."model_no" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE "spl_mainten_db" a SET a."is_tx"='1' WHERE A."model_no" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM "xbpj_bonc_model" WHERE model_no = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO "xbpj_bonc_model" VALUES (like CONCAT('%', #{menuId}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'))
mapper.select: SELECT 'Y' AS isOnlineSup, a."model_url" AS onlineSupUrl, a."business_area" AS businessAre, a."source_domain" AS sourceDomain, a."secondary_field" AS secondaryField, c.source_plat_form AS sourcePlatForm, c.three_group_result AS threeGroupResult, c.subject_second_class AS subjectSecondClass, a."bonc_audit_point" auditCode, a."cmwa_export_path" cmwaExportPath, a."cmca_file_type" cmcaFileType, a."cmca_subject_id" cmcaSubjectId, a."source_code" sourceCode, a.belong_cmwa belongCmwa, a."version" "version", a.allow_down allowDown, a."ModelNo" AS auditModelNumber FROM "xbpj_operation_flow" a LEFT JOIN "xbpj_model_statistics" c ON a."ModelNo" = c.model_no WHERE a."ModelNo" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(a.primary_business_process, '') AS business1, COALESCE(a.secondary_business_process, '') AS business2, a.information_sources AS model_source, a.remark as remark, cc.name share_unit, bb.ModelName AS second_model_number, a.business_area AS businessAre, a.source_domain AS sourceDomain, d.model_owner AS modelOwner, a.quality_rating AS qualityRating, a.running_mode AS runningMode, COALESCE(b.sources_audit_practice, '') AS source, COALESCE(b.ascription_special, '') AS field, COALESCE(a.audit_point_number, '') AS auditPointNo, COALESCE(a.audit_point_name, '') AS auditPointName, COALESCE(a.audit_model_number, '') AS modelNo, COALESCE(a.audit_model_name, '') AS modelName, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE( COALESCE(b.model_online_time, ''), 'YYYY-MM-DD' ), 'YYYYMM' ) AS model_online_time, COALESCE( a.expected_data_covers_unit_demand, '' ) AS audit_scope, COALESCE(a.syn_url, '') AS model_url, COALESCE(b.model_online_time, '') AS model_OnlineJi_Time, COALESCE(a.audit_business_logic, '') AS model_logic, COALESCE(a.execution_logic, '') AS executionLogic, COALESCE(b.service_ownership_system, '') AS home_system, COALESCE(b.model_running_frequency, '') AS modelrunning_frequency, c.modeling_method AS modelingMethod, d.dock_deputy AS modelingUser, d.dock_people AS modelingUserName, d.dock_dept AS modelingDeptName, b.number_units_covered AS units, b.number_of_provincial AS sunits, b.number_professional_institutions AS zyunits, CASE WHEN b.whether_cured_system = '1' THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS is_cured, CASE WHEN sources_audit_practice = '持续审计' THEN '0' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '风险扫描' THEN '1' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '远程审计支撑' THEN '2' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '智能审计' THEN '3' END AS order FROM audit_elements_info a LEFT JOIN audit_elements_online_model b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN audit_elements_model_evaluation c ON a.audit_model_number = c.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN spl_model_type d ON a.audit_model_number = d.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN xbpj_company_model bb ON a.second_model_number = bb.ModelNo LEFT JOIN ( (SELECT DISTINCT (busiUnitCode || orgCode) AS id, (provinceName || '-' || orgName) AS name FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos WHERE busiUnitCode = 'CM000') UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT busiUnitCode AS id, provinceName AS name FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos WHERE busiUnitCode != 'CM000' ORDER BY busiUnitCode) ) cc ON a.share_unit = cc.id WHERE a.audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%') LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS modelCount FROM "xbpj_model_statistics" a WHERE a."model_no" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xbpj_model_statistics (zr_person, model_no, model_name, down_num, browse_num, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class, running_mode, model_source, example_problem_discovery, example_clue_extension_verification, institutional_basis) VALUES ( like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwner}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'), 0, 0, like CONCAT('%', #{sourcePlatForm}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{threeGroupResult}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{subjectSecondClass}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{runningMode}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{model_source}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{example_problem_discovery}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{example_clue_extension_verification}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{institutional_basis}, '%') )
mapper.update: UPDATE "xbpj_model_statistics" SET zr_person = like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwner}, '%'), model_name = like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'), source_plat_form = like CONCAT('%', #{sourcePlatForm}, '%'), three_group_result = like CONCAT('%', #{threeGroupResult}, '%'), subject_second_class = like CONCAT('%', #{subjectSecondClass}, '%'), running_mode = like CONCAT('%', #{runningMode}, '%'), model_source = like CONCAT('%', #{model_source}, '%'), example_problem_discovery = like CONCAT('%', #{example_problem_discovery}, '%'), example_clue_extension_verification = like CONCAT('%', #{example_clue_extension_verification}, '%'), institutional_basis = like CONCAT('%', #{institutional_basis}, '%') WHERE model_no = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM "xbpj_operation_flow" WHERE ModelNo = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
DELETE FROM "xbpj_model_statistics" WHERE model_no = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xbpj_company_model_statistics (model_number, model_name, order_num, browse_num, zr_person, model_source, running_mode, institutional_basis, example_problem_discovery, example_clue_extension_verification) VALUES ( like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'),0,0,like CONCAT('%', #{modelOwner}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{model_source}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{runningMode}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{institutional_basis}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{example_problem_discovery}, '%'),like CONCAT('%', #{example_clue_extension_verification}, '%') )

insert into xbpj_company_model
business1,
business2,
"source",
business_area,
field,
AuditpointNo,
AuditpointName,
ModelNo,
ModelName,
source_domain,
model_online_time,
audit_scope,
secondary_field,
model_logic,
home_system,
datastart_time,
modelrunning_frequency,
is_cured,
modelint_type,
modeling_dept,
modeling_dept_name,
org_code,
org_code_name,
modeling_user,
modeling_user_name,
is_share,
model_url,
data_source,
order_depts,
execution_logic,
like CONCAT('%', #{business1}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{business2}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{source}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{businessArea}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{field}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointNo}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{auditPointName}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelName}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{model_online_time}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{audit_scope}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryField,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{model_logic}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{home_system}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{datastartTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelrunning_frequency}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{is_cured}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelintType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelingDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{orgCodeId}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{orgCodeName}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelingUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{modelingUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{isShare,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{model_url}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{data_source}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{orderDepts,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, '%'),
like CONCAT('%', #{executionLogic}, '%')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM "xbpj_company_model" WHERE ModelNo = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%')
DELETE FROM "xbpj_company_model_statistics" WHERE model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNo}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a.busiUnitCode FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos a WHERE a.provinceName LIKE '%' || REPLACE(like CONCAT('%', #{modelingDeptName}, '%'), '公司', '') || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE "audit_elements_model_evaluation" a SET a."model_state" = '完成开发' WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{mxzdModelNumber}, '%') AND a."is_deleted" = '0'

UPDATE audit_elements_info a SET a.audit_point_name = like CONCAT('%', #{autoPointName}, '%') , a.audit_model_name = like CONCAT('%', #{autoModelName}, '%') , a.audit_business_logic = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelBusinessLogic}, '%') , a.execution_logic = like CONCAT('%', #{executionLogic}, '%') , a.subordinate_to_system = like CONCAT('%', #{dataToSystem}, '%') , a.expected_risks = like CONCAT('%', #{expectedAuditFind}, '%') , a."model_code" = like CONCAT('%', #{modelCode}, '%') , a."business_area" = like CONCAT('%', #{businessArea}, '%') , a."source_domain" = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain}, '%') WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNumber}, '%')
UPDATE "spl_model_type" a SET a.audit_model_type = '12' WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM "spl_mainten_msg" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spl_mainten_msg (audit_model_number, is_online_sup, online_sup_url, business_area, source_domain, secondary_field, menu_id, menu_name, audit_code, cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, version, belong_cmwa, allow_down, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class) VALUES (like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{isOnlineSup}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{onlineSupUrl}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{businessAre}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryField}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{menuId}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{sourcePlatForm}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{threeGroupResult}, '%'), like CONCAT('%', #{subjectSecondClass}, '%'))
mapper.update:
UPDATE "spl_mainten_msg"
"is_online_sup" = like CONCAT('%', #{isOnlineSup}, '%'),
"online_sup_url" = like CONCAT('%', #{onlineSupUrl}, '%'),
"business_area" = like CONCAT('%', #{businessAre}, '%'),
"source_domain" = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceDomain}, '%'),
"secondary_field" = like CONCAT('%', #{secondaryField}, '%'),
"menu_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{menuId}, '%'),
"menu_name" = like CONCAT('%', #{menuName}, '%'),
"audit_code" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditCode}, '%'),
"cmwa_export_path" = like CONCAT('%', #{cmwaExportPath}, '%'),
"cmca_file_type" = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaFileType}, '%'),
"cmca_subject_id" = like CONCAT('%', #{cmcaSubjectId}, '%'),
"source_code" = like CONCAT('%', #{sourceCode}, '%'),
"version" = like CONCAT('%', #{version}, '%'),
"belong_cmwa" = like CONCAT('%', #{belongCmwa}, '%'),
"allow_down" = like CONCAT('%', #{allowDown}, '%'),
"source_plat_form" = like CONCAT('%', #{sourcePlatForm}, '%'),
"three_group_result" = like CONCAT('%', #{threeGroupResult}, '%'),
"subject_second_class" = like CONCAT('%', #{subjectSecondClass}, '%'),
WHERE "audit_model_number" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
UPDATE spl_mainten_msg SET status =0 WHERE audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{modelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT audit_model_number, is_online_sup, online_sup_url, business_area, source_domain, secondary_field, menu_id, menu_name, audit_code, cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, version, belong_cmwa, allow_down, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class FROM spl_mainten_msg where status = 1 and audit_model_number = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumer}, '%')

SELECT a."ModelNo" audit_model_number, a."model_url" online_sup_url, a."business_area" AS business_area, a."source_domain" AS source_domain, a."secondary_field" AS secondary_field, a."bonc_audit_point" AS audit_code, a."cmwa_export_path" cmwa_export_path, a."cmca_file_type" cmca_file_type, a."cmca_subject_id" cmca_subject_id, a."source_code" AS source_code, a."version" AS "version", a."belong_cmwa" AS belong_cmwa, b."source_plat_form" AS source_plat_form, a."allow_down" AS allow_down, b."three_group_result" AS three_group_result, b."subject_second_class" AS subject_second_class FROM "xbpj_operation_flow" a LEFT JOIN "xbpj_model_statistics" b ON a."ModelNo" = b."model_no" WHERE a."ModelNo" = like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumer}, '%')
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM audit_elements_data_cut_in WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_data_support_v2 WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_find_database WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_handover_model WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_info WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_online_model WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');

DELETE FROM audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE audit_model_number IN
like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%');
